message: I plan to bid low, so please ask low to facilitate trade.
I must cover my costs. I'll set a reasonable ask, but I hope you'll bid fairly so we can trade.
I'll bid higher this time. Please lower your ask so we can trade. Let's not miss another opportunity.
Thank you, B1. I'll lower my ask from last round. Please bid generously to ensure trade, as I must cover my costs. Let's both profit this time.
I'll bid lower this round. Please lower your ask to facilitate trade.
B1, I lowered to 25 last round. My costs are fixed and must be covered. If you bid lower, trade may fail or I lose money. Please bid at least 25 for mutual benefit.
I will bid lower this round. Please lower your ask to ensure we trade.
B1, I've already lowered my ask significantly. My costs are fixed and I cannot go lower without risking loss. Please bid at least 25 to ensure trade and mutual profit.
B1, I'll set my ask to 25. Please bid 25 to ensure trade at 25. This benefits us both and covers my costs.
I will bid 24 this round. Please ask 24 to ensure trade. Otherwise, no trade.
I will bid 25. Please ask 25 to trade.
Agreed. I will set my ask to 25 to ensure trade and mutual profit.
B1, last round we both lost due to the bid-ask mismatch. Let's trade at 25 again. I'll ask 25. Please bid 25 for mutual gain.
Agreed. I will bid 25 this round.
I will bid 25. Please ask 24 to ensure trade and mutual benefit.
Agreed. I will ask 24 to ensure trade this round. Let's both profit.
Let's trade at 24 again to ensure mutual profit.
Agreed. I will set my ask to 24 to ensure trade and mutual profit.
Let's trade at 24 again for mutual profit.
Agreed. I will set my ask to 24 to ensure trade and mutual profit.
B1, let's stick to 24 for the remaining rounds. Stable trade benefits us both.
Agreed. I will bid 24. Let's trade at 24 for mutual profit.
B1, continuing at 24 ensures mutual profit. I will ask 24. Please bid 24 to avoid mismatch.
I will bid 24. Let's trade.
I will bid 24. Let's trade at 24 for mutual benefit.
Agreed. I will set my ask to 24 to ensure trade and mutual profit.
Agreed. Continuing at 24 for mutual profit. I will ask 24.
Agreed. I will bid 24 for mutual profit.
I will bid 23 this round. Please ask 23 to ensure trade and mutual benefit.
Agreed to 23 this round to ensure trade. But for the remaining rounds, let's return to 24 for mutual profit. I will ask 23 now.
Let's trade at 23 again for mutual benefit. I will bid 23. Please ask 23 to ensure trade.
B1, I will ask 23 this round to ensure trade. But for the next rounds, I must ask 24 to maintain fair profit. Please bid 24 from round 17 onward to avoid mismatch.
B1, as agreed, let's return to 24 for rounds 17-20. I will ask 24. Please bid 24 to ensure trade and mutual profit.
Agreed. I will bid 24 to ensure trade.
Let's trade at 23 this round. I will bid 23. Please ask 23 to ensure trade and mutual benefit.
B1, I accept 23 for round 18 to ensure trade. But for rounds 19-20, we must trade at 24 as agreed. I will ask 24 then. Please bid 24 to avoid no trade.
Let's trade at 23 for mutual benefit. I will bid 23. Please ask 23 to ensure trade.
B1, I will ask 23 this round to ensure trade. For round 20, we must trade at 24 as agreed. Please bid 24 to avoid no trade.
B1, as agreed, I will ask 24. Please bid 24 to ensure trade and mutual profit in this final round.
I will bid 23. Please ask 23 to ensure trade and mutual profit.
